requirement_topic.en: EMRC / NEPCO Grid-Connection Review for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMRC / NEPCO 光伏逆变器并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: EMRC / NEPCO 光伏逆變器併網審查

summary.en: Jordan grid-connected PV projects are reviewed through EMRC renewable-energy rules and the relevant network operator, including NEPCO for transmission-connected arrangements or the licensed distribution company for distribution-connected systems. EMRC publishes renewable-energy connection material, including rules for intermittent renewable generation on medium-voltage distribution networks.
summary.zh: 约旦并网光伏项目按 EMRC 可再生能源规则以及相关网络运营方进行审查，输电侧安排涉及 NEPCO，配电侧系统涉及持牌配电公司。EMRC 发布可再生能源接入资料，包括间歇性可再生能源发电接入中压配电网络的规则。
summary.zht: 約旦併網光伏項目按 EMRC 再生能源規則以及相關網路營運方進行審查，輸電側安排涉及 NEPCO，配電側系統涉及持牌配電公司。EMRC 發布再生能源接入資料，包括間歇性再生能源發電接入中壓配電網路的規則。

standards_or_laws: Rules for connecting intermittent renewable generation to medium-voltage distribution networks
NEPCO or licensed distribution-company grid-connection requirements

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence commonly cites GB/T 19964 for PV power-station grid connection and GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements. These documents are useful baselines but do not replace Jordan project-level settings, protection, metering, and network acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常引用 GB/T 19964 光伏电站接入电力系统技术要求以及 GB/T 37408 光伏并网逆变器技术要求。这些文件可作为有用基线，但不能替代约旦项目级设置、保护、计量和网络认可。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常引用 GB/T 19964 光伏電站接入電力系統技術要求以及 GB/T 37408 光伏併網逆變器技術要求。這些文件可作為有用基線，但不能替代約旦項目級設定、保護、計量和網路認可。

gap.en: Prepare Jordan-specific settings for voltage and frequency protection, anti-islanding, reactive-power behavior, reconnection, power-quality limits, remote control or curtailment where relevant, single-line diagrams, relay settings, and site commissioning records.
gap.zh: 应准备约旦专用设置，覆盖电压和频率保护、防孤岛、无功行为、重连、电能质量限值、适用时的远程控制或限发、单线图、继电保护设置和现场调试记录。
gap.zht: 應準備約旦專用設定，覆蓋電壓和頻率保護、防孤島、無功行為、重連、電能品質限值、適用時的遠端控制或限發、單線圖、繼電保護設定和現場調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Jordan grid connection where the inverter is installed in a grid-connected PV project
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for Chinese grid-connected PV projects; not transferable as Jordan network approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid files are a starting point only. Jordan requires project-level acceptance through EMRC and the relevant network operator.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国 GB/T 并网文件只是起点。约旦需要通过 EMRC 和相关网络运营方完成项目级认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國 GB/T 併網文件只是起點。約旦需要通過 EMRC 和相關網路營運方完成項目級認可。
